title: Can someone clarify just a few things for me
display_title: Can someone clarify just a few things for me
wikitext:
[]: Can someone clarify just a few things for me?             Quote Post by Cesternino53 » Thu Jan 25, 2007 11:52 pm In my continuing quest for Eva knowledge (not in an obsessive way) I know find myself almost able to hold an intelligent conversation about Eva. I can give a rouch definition (very very rough in places) about most things, but I need a bit of help. What exactly are the two fruits that I've read about? The fruit of knowledge and somehing else... One other thing, what is the difference between terminal and central dogma?

[]: Re: Can someone clarify just a few things for me?             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Jan 26, 2007 12:18 am Cesternino53 wrote: What exactly are the two fruits that I've read about? The fruit of knowledge and somehing else...

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Jan 27, 2007 2:48 pm The Fruit of Knowledge is free will? Or maybe just the biblical fruit...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 27, 2007 3:10 pm cat42 wrote: The Fruit of Knowledge is free will? Or maybe just the biblical fruit...

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Sat Jan 27, 2007 3:33 pm LTP#12 In Antarctica. Kouzou: There's no allowance for the existence of living things in this world of death called Antarctica. Kouzou: Maybe we should just call it "Hell". Gendou: Nevertheless, we human beings are standing here, existing as living things. Kouzou: Because we're protected by the power of science. Gendou: Science is human power. Kouzou: It's that arrogance that caused the tragedy 15 years ago, the Second Impact. This scene is the result. It's too harsh a punishment for us, though, considering the crime. This is just like the Dead Sea! Gendou: And yet this is a purified world, a world lacking the impurity of the original sin. Kouzou: I hope for a world where people can live, no matter how steeped in sin.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Jan 27, 2007 3:48 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: cat42 wrote: The Fruit of Knowledge is free will? Or maybe just the biblical fruit...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 27, 2007 3:52 pm I'd like to take this moment to point out the Angels are human. Also take note to the word Knowledge. Free will does not = knowledge in the NGEverse since there was no Eden. I'd say the Fruit of Knowledge is our adaptability and ingenuity.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 27, 2007 4:39 pm It's been suggested that human (Lilim) DNA is the Fruit of Knowledge -- or, at least, the physical manifestation thereof -- and would thus directly parallel the Super Solenoid Engine with its double-helical shape and all. < Relevant Thread > But I never found this to be entirely convincing, myself. IMO, the concept of the S2 Engine literally being the FoL is wrought with problems. A possibility I typically lean towards is that the "Fruits" are actually metabiological factors that manifest in different ways -- the FoL in the obvious one, and the FoK in... er... Yeah. AEF wrote: I'd like to take this moment to point out the Angels are human.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 27, 2007 4:50 pm Reichu wrote: IMO, the concept of the S2 Engine literally being the FoL is wrought with problems. A possibility I typically lean towards is that the "Fruits" are actually metabiological factors that manifest in different ways -- the FoL in the obvious one, and the FoK in... er... Yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 27, 2007 5:53 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: and the FoK would probably manifest as our brains being adaptive and inventive.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jan 27, 2007 6:02 pm Did they clone their mom and use her as a weapon? To a lesser extent I'd say they are capable of if, but this trait is OUR biggest strength. It is called the Fruit of Knowledge after all. Adam's kids don't really come of as scientific now do they?

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sun Jan 28, 2007 2:28 pm The Angels derive their strength from the S^2 engine. Lilith based life has no such protection. The Lilim was forced to develop itâ€™s own defences Ep 17 wrote: FUYUTSUKI: The city, a paradise made by mankind. IKARI: Once driven from Paradise, man had no choice but to escape to this earthly existence, side by side with death. Our own paradise, created by the resourcefulness that this weakest of beings was forced to develop. FUYUTSUKI: To protect ourselves from the fear of death, to satiate our thirst for pleasure, a paradise we created ourselves. This city's truly such a paradise. A armed city made to protect us.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 29, 2007 8:48 am Katayoku no Tenshi wrote: Or was the Fruit of Wisdom obtained at that point? This is straight after GNK makes Shinji go all wibbly. So the FoW is â€¦ human DNAâ€¦LCL?

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Mon Jan 29, 2007 11:17 pm Reichu wrote: IMO, the concept of the S2 Engine literally being the FoL is wrought with problems.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Jan 29, 2007 11:21 pm Meh, i've been doing fine just thinking that the Fruit comparisons were just more Pointless Religious Symbolism and blowing it off, but whatever...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 12:05 am Trigger's Elysium wrote: Meh, i've been doing fine just thinking that the Fruit comparisons were just more Pointless Religious Symbolism and blowing it off, but whatever...

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Tue Jan 30, 2007 4:31 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: The problem with that, Rawinder, is the Evas didn't come with them and Adam's natural kids did. So what did Adam's natural kids have that the Evas didn't? Well souls directly from Adam, the Seed of the FoL.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 6:35 am ORAMI!? wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: The problem with that, Rawinder, is the Evas didn't come with them and Adam's natural kids did. So what did Adam's natural kids have that the Evas didn't? Well souls directly from Adam, the Seed of the FoL.

[]:             Quote Post by ORAMI!? » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:16 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Rawinder is saying the FoL is a physical object.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:26 am I don't recall the show EVER saying that.
